title: Install hydroponic systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install hydroponic systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for installation

pcs.text: Interpret site plans and design specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret site plans and design specifications?

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.
